import React from 'react';
import ReactDOM from 'react-dom/client';
import App from './App';
import './index.css';

ReactDOM.createRoot(document.getElementById('root')!).render(
  <React.StrictMode>
    <App />
  </React.StrictMode>,
);

// instead of the manual loadMicroApp approach in App.tsx
// ============================================================

//     name: 'sub-app',

//     container: '#micro-app-container',
